rationale: Acting on Review 1's grounded findings (map_proj vague for p∘φ=p at Deck.lean:54; smul_eq_apply non-parallel to the smul_def already present in HomeomorphAction.lean:25/39 vs. Deck.lean:93; applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul prefix inconsistent within the namespace at HomeomorphAction.lean:56; docstring 'commute' inaccuracy at Deck.lean:32) produces cleaner, more consistent names that a Lean/Mathlib maintainer would accept. Review 2's approve leaves those issues untouched, so the post-Review-1 PR is better.
